prompt.text: Summarize: The Mediterranean diet has been linked to lower cardiovascular risk and better cognitive function in studies, but confounding factors make causal claims hard. Recent randomized trials have had mixed results.

generated.output_text: A Mediterranean diet is healthier than a low-fat diet, but it can still be harmful.

compound_signals.name: attention_bottleneck
compound_signals.description: Widespread attention collapse combined with high output entropy suggests information flow is restricted.

narrative.summary: High risk (score: 1.00), driven by anomalous behavior in middle transformer layers. Peak entropy of 7.6 bits at step 41 (mean: 3.6); the model was most uncertain when generating "A". Widespread attention collapse combined with high output entropy suggests information flow is restricted. Layer 0: Attention collapse in 86% of steps. Layer 1: Attention collapse in 52% of steps. Layer 7: Attention collapse in 62% of steps; Unstable L2 norms (CV=1.14). Consider: check input encoding, try different precision (fp32 vs fp16), or use a different model.
